description_long: This object is a compact solar energy infrastructure unit featuring a flat, rectangular array of solar panels mounted on a low-profile base. The panels are bordered by a metallic frame, with visible support structures and several black and red components that likely serve as electrical housings or junction boxes. The surface of the panels is smooth and reflective, indicating high-efficiency photovoltaic cells. The base appears to be constructed from metal, providing stability and durability for outdoor urban environments. There are no visible moving parts, and the design is optimized for stationary installation. The overall appearance suggests a modular, ground-mounted solar array suitable for small-scale power generation in urban settings.
description: A compact, ground-mounted solar panel array with a metallic frame, black and red electrical housings, and a smooth, reflective surface. Designed for stationary urban power generation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the solar panel array, with black and red housings visible at the far end.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the array and the arrangement of electrical housings at the near edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the panel surface and the support structure beneath, with red markings visible.
description_view_3: Reverse end view focusing on the electrical housings and the base structure supporting the panels.
attribute_panel_orientation: flat, parallel to the ground, fixed orientation
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a low-profile metallic frame, likely aluminum
attribute_array_configuration: single linear row of 3-4 panels, closely spaced
